creator: blacktravelpin
caption:
You never ever want to leave.

Even if you complain all the time..
about the prices, the hustle, the traffic, and that crazy summer heat that hits you like a wall.

Even when the taxi driver says “I’m here” but he’s nowhere near you. 😅

Even when the construction wakes you up way too early.

Dubai isn’t always easy…
but once you get used to the vibe,
everything else feels… boring.

Too quiet. Too slow. Too normal.

So yeah, you complain.

But the second you leave?

You miss it all.
Even the chaos. Even the noise. Even the heat. 😅
